title: Ensure canonical event ordering (append → state → cursor)
acceptance_criteria: Event append → tx_state update → cursor persist is enforced for all transaction events.
Invalid event sequences (e.g., tx.commit.start without tx.begin/verify.start) are rejected with clear errors.
tx_state rebuild completes without halting on malformed ordering.

steps.description: Locate where transaction events are appended, state is updated, and cursor is persisted.
Enforce canonical ordering in tool wrappers and persistence helpers.
Add ordering validation to prevent event log sequences that break rebuild.
Update tests to cover rebuild stability and ordering errors.

notes: Keep changes minimal and focused on ordering and validation.
Surface precise error messages for missing prerequisites.
